CustomField.description: Reference to the date captured on the Account which is populated by rollup helper
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date of a scheduled Onboarding Check-In Call (Outreach Meeting Type = OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up (Non-RR), OBS Single-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up 15 min (Non-RR), OBS Multi-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up (Non-RR), OBS Multi-Site: Brightwheel Wrap Up 15 min (Non-RR))
CustomField.label: Onboarding Check-in Call Scheduled
